headline: Directora de Agencias
summary:
Directora de Agencias en Marketmedios, donde lidero la estrategia comercial con agencias y marcas nacionales e internacionales. Me apasiona conectar marcas con resultados a través de medios innovadores, retail media y formatos de alto impacto.

Con una trayectoria enfocada en expansión de negocios, alianzas estratégicas y negociaciones de alto nivel, creo en el valor de las relaciones sólidas, el trabajo bien hecho y el poder de la publicidad para transformar negocios.

Siempre abierta a nuevas ideas, conexiones y proyectos que generen valor real.

experiences.title: Ejecutivo de cuentas
experiences.description: Sales Executive: ATL, BTL. MarketIndoor June 2016 – April 2018. •	Sales and marketing of advertising spaces in shopping malls. Advertising in fix spaces with small, medium and large formats. •	BTL activations, screen advertising, and special projects at strategic places addressed to specific audiences to produce quick major impact. •	Clients: LATAM, Adidas, Claro, BMW, TIGO, Warner, Fox, Discovery, Postobon, Coca-Cola, Samsung, Huawei, Nike, Bavaria, Rappi, Diageo BTL Account Executive December 2014–June 2016 •	Development and implementation of small, medium and large format events. •	Face to face relationships with clients to offer BTL services to public and private sectors. •	Management of suppliers. •	Establishment of business relationships with selected media, as part of clients’ global marketing strategy. •	Event planning and activations •	Clients: National Savings Fund, Presidency of the Republic, Discovery, BMW Motorrad, BMW, David Group, among others.

experiences.title: Trade Assistant
experiences.description: •	Export and tourism research for business opportunities between the UK and Colombia, mainly in agroindustry, textile, tourism and digital services. •	Planning and coordination of commercial activities of Colombian companies with UK firms, for the promotion of businesses between them. •	Enhanced interactions between Colombian and UK public and private institutions.

experiences.title: Freelance BTL executive
experiences.description: •	Develop BTL strategies for different campaigns. •	Support of the different events of the BTL department. •	Make final reports of the different activities of the BTL department.

experiences.company: Ministerio de Tecnologías de la Información y las Comunicaciones
experiences.title: Organizational Advisor
experiences.description: •	Research for the General Secretariat on organizational climate and culture. Some research on knowledge management for the design and implementation of the Ministry’s Corporate School. •	 Assistance to the Ministry in the implementation of activities relating to organizational climate and culture.

experiences.title: Internship as an International News Reporter
experiences.description: •	Logistics and informative assistance to the editorial team of CM& International. •	Review and development of international news. •	Review of additional sources of information and news agencies, drafting notes for CM&  newscast and web page •	Drafting and recording special notes for the newscast.
